text: {"suggestedLabel":"Pro‑UNILAG Optimist","suggestedDescription":"A perspective that champions UNILAG as Nigeria’s premier university, embracing any evidence that highlights its strengths and treating contrary data as merely uncertain.","stances":[{"claimIndex":0,"stance":"accept","rationale":"UNILAG is indeed a public, federal research university at the heart of Nigeria’s commercial hub."},{"claimIndex":1,"stance":"accept","rationale":"The university’s founding year of 1962 is a matter of record."},{"claimIndex":2,"stance":"accept","rationale":"Enrolling over 48,000 students across 19 faculties showcases its massive scale and appeal."},{"claimIndex":3,"stance":"accept","rationale":"Admitting roughly 8,500 new undergraduates each year underscores its popularity."},{"claimIndex":4,"stance":"accept","rationale":"The tuition‑free policy with modest fees demonstrates UNILAG’s commitment to accessible education."},{"claimIndex":5,"stance":"accept","rationale":"The stated fee range aligns with the university’s affordable tuition structure."},{"claimIndex":6,"stance":"accept","rationale":"The College of Medicine’s six‑year MBBS programme is a flagship professional offering."},{"claimIndex":7,"stance":"accept","rationale":"Repeating the description reinforces the university’s established identity."},{"claimIndex":8,"stance":"accept","rationale":"Being ranked #2 in Nigeria by EduRank 2026 bolsters the claim of excellence."},{"claimIndex":9,"stance":"accept","rationale":"A Forbes ranking of 3rd‑best in Africa adds prestigious continental recognition."},{"claimIndex":10,"stance":"accept","rationale":"The 2008 NUC Efficiency award as Best University in Nigeria highlights
